name: libtumbler-1-0t64
title: libtumbler-1-0t64
summary: library for tumbler, a D-Bus thumbnailing service
description:
library for tumbler, a D-Bus thumbnailing service
Tumbler is a D-Bus service for applications to request thumbnails for various
URI schemes and MIME types. It is an implementation of the thumbnail management
D-Bus specification described on http://live.gnome.org/ThumbnailerSpec.
.
This package contains the shared library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtumbler-1-0t64 because library for tumbler, a D-Bus thumbnailing service.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtumbler-1-0t64 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtumbler-1-0t64 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtumbler-1-0t64 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
